candidates.why: This is a single operating D&A line shown separately from the selected COGS bucket ('Direct materials'), but it is not labeled as COGS/cost of sales/cost of revenues D&A specifically. Using it for COGS_DA would risk misclassifying group-level operating D&A as production cost D&A.

variables.notes: No explicit COGS-specific depreciation/amortization row is visible above the financial section. The only D&A row is a generic operating D&A line, so it should not be added to COGS separately.

candidates.why: This is an explicit operating D&A line presented separately at the same level as the selected XSGA component rows ('Personnel expenses' and 'Other operating expenses'). The prior XSGA selection explicitly excluded depreciation/amortization, so this row appears outside the selected XSGA bucket and should be added separately later.

variables.notes: Selected the separate operating D&A line for SG&A/overhead because it is clearly outside the previously selected XSGA component rows and no more specific SG&A D&A summary/components are shown.
